generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who cares about national security, I've been following the debate on expanding domestic security powers. It's clear we need to strike the right balance between safety and civil liberties. The recent attacks in Europe show how vulnerable we are when we don't have the tools to act quickly. Local law enforcement agrees - they've been asking for these powers for years to better protect communities. It's not about trusting the government blindly, but about giving our heroes the tools they need to keep us safe. #SecurityFirst #SupportOurHeroes
